intent.description: One sentence, user-voiced, specific. e.g. 'Book round-trip flights SFO to LAX for July 10-13'. Never generic ('browsing travel sites').

progress_state.description: Where exactly the user stopped, with the concrete facts observed: options compared, prices seen, step reached, text written. 1-3 sentences.

key_facts.description: Atomic facts needed to resume: '$178 Southwest itinerary', 'Dr. Chen — best reviews, insurance unverified'.

next_action.description: The single concrete next step, phrased as an action the user (or Tier 3 prep) can take.

prepared_advance.description: Tier 3 output awaiting user approval. Null if none.

deadline.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime if a deadline was observed or directly inferable; otherwise null. Never invent one.

deadline_source.description: Verbatim text the deadline was extracted from, e.g. 'expires Aug 3, 2026'. Required when deadline is non-null.

app.description: App to reopen, for non-web loops

evidence.description: Indices of session observations supporting this loop.
